arguments.argument:
draw_self()
if cannonProg=0 and bCannonInUse=1 { draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_font(fnt_GOoptions) draw_set_halign(fa_center) textDropShadow(string("FIRE THE CANNON: [") +string(global.ctrlJump) +string("]#Get out: [") +string(global.ctrlActA) +string("]"),view_xview[0]+240,view_yview[0]+176,c_white,c_black,4) }
